svg.text: Content dedup → classify → intent-slot SLM (5 heads, SLM-first) → GLiNER NER (parallel) → admission / reconciliation / episodes

g.text: 4. Store full doc + sections in document store
Profile in memory store, sections in document store
Tantivy BM25 + SPLADE v3 (110M) + GLiNER NER (209M) run in parallel. Store returns in ~2ms, indexing completes async.
Both ATOMIC and NAVIGABLE paths feed into background indexing for BM25/SPLADE/entity extraction.

svg.text: store_memory() path: Dedup → Classify → [ATOMIC: Admission → Persist | NAVIGABLE: Document Profile] → Background Index → Entity Link → Episode
publish_document() path: Dedup → Classify (forced NAVIGABLE via source_format) → Document Profile → Background Index → Entity Link → Episode
Feature flags: NCMS_CONTENT_CLASSIFICATION_ENABLED · NCMS_INTENT_SLOT_ENABLED (SLM-first admission / state / topic) · NCMS_ADMISSION_ENABLED (regex fallback)
NCMS_RECONCILIATION_ENABLED · NCMS_EPISODES_ENABLED · NCMS_TLG_ENABLED (query-side grammar; consumes state_change_head output) · NCMS_CONTRADICTION_DETECTION_ENABLED
